info.name: BX Finance — 2-Exchange Delegated Chain — pi.flow
info.description:
PingOne 2-Exchange Delegated Chain — PINGONE_MAY_ACT_TWO_TOKEN_EXCHANGES.md

Token Chain:
  Steps 1–4  — Subject Token (Authorization Code + PKCE via pi.flow)
               aud=["https://ai-agent.pingdemo.com"], may_act.sub=AI_AGENT_CLIENT_ID
  Step 5a    — AI Agent Actor Token (Client Credentials: AI Agent App)
               aud=["https://agent-gateway.pingdemo.com"]
  Step 5b    — Exchange #1: Subject Token + Agent Actor Token → Agent Exchanged Token
               aud=["https://mcp-server.pingdemo.com"], act.sub=AI_AGENT_CLIENT_ID
  Step 6a    — MCP Actor Token (Client Credentials: MCP Service App)
               aud=["https://mcp-gateway.pingdemo.com"]
  Step 6b    — Exchange #2: Agent Exchanged Token + MCP Actor Token → MCP Exchanged Token
               aud=["https://resource-server.pingdemo.com"]
               act.sub=MCP_CLIENT_ID, act.act.sub=AI_AGENT_CLIENT_ID
  Step 7     — PingOne API Token (Client Credentials: MCP Service)
  Step 8     — User Lookup (PingOne Management API)
  Utility A  — Introspect any saved token
  Utility B  — Set mayAct on user record (sub must be AI_AGENT_CLIENT_ID)

IMPORTANT: Do NOT include openid in any scope — it breaks resource-scoped requests.
  Subject Token scope: profile email banking:agent:invoke
  Actor token requests: audience param only (no scope, or app-minimal scope)
  Exchange result scope: banking:accounts:read banking:transactions:read banking:transactions:write

Variables to fill in before running:
  client_id / client_secret        — BX Finance User app (issues Subject Token)
  ai_agent_client_id / secret      — BX Finance AI Agent App (performs Exchange #1)
  mcp_client_id / secret           — BX Finance MCP Service (performs Exchange #2 + CC for API)
  username / password              — test user credentials
  env_id                           — PingOne environment ID

exec: // crypto.subtle.digest is async — Postman fires the request before it resolves.
// Use CryptoJS.SHA256 (synchronous). Deprecation warning is harmless.
// Prefer usernamePassword.check link; fall back to self
// PingOne returns COMPLETED immediately when an ST session cookie exists.
// In that case: auth_code is already available, skip steps 2 and 3.
console.log('[Step 1] Session active — COMPLETED. auth_code:', body.authorizeResponse.code);
console.log('[Step 1] *** SKIP steps 2 and 3 — go straight to step 4. ***');
console.log('[Step 1] COMPLETED but no auth_code in response — try step 3 (resume).');
console.log('[Step 1] status:', body.status, '— proceed to step 2.');
throw new Error('flow_href is empty — step 1 returned COMPLETED (session active). Skip to step 4.');
throw new Error('flow_href is empty — run request 1 first');
console.log('[Step 2] Skip step 3 — go straight to step 4.');
console.log('[Step 2] No direct auth code — proceed to step 3 (resume).');

request.description:
Submits credentials to the flow URL from step 1.

No Authorization header — the flow ID in the URL is the implicit context.
Content-Type must be application/vnd.pingidentity.usernamePassword.check+json.

exec: throw new Error('resume_url is empty but auth_code is already set — skip to step 4.');
throw new Error('resume_url is empty — run requests 1 and 2 first');
console.warn('[Step 3] No auth code in JSON response:', JSON.stringify(body));
console.warn('[Step 3] Could not find code. Response URL:', url);

request.description:
Resumes the flow after credential submission, returning the authorization code.

PingOne may return JSON with authorizeResponse.code, or redirect to redirect_uri?code=...
Postman follows redirects automatically — the test script handles both cases.

item.name: 4. Exchange Code for Subject Token (client_secret_post + PKCE)

exec: throw new Error('auth_code is empty — run requests 1, 2, and 3 first');
throw new Error('code_verifier is empty — re-run request 1 to regenerate PKCE');
// Save as subject_token (Token 1) and decode claims
console.log('[Step 4] Subject Token claims:', JSON.stringify(claims, null, 2));
pm.test('Subject Token aud is AI Agent', () => {
console.warn('[Step 4] Run Utility B (Set mayAct) — value must be AI Agent App client ID, then re-run steps 1-4');
console.warn('[Step 4] Could not decode access token JWT:', e.message);

request.description:
Token 1 — Subject Token.
client_secret_post: credentials in body, no Authorization header.
PKCE: code_verifier proves possession of code_challenge from step 1.

After success: subject_token and user_sub saved. Check console for may_act claim.
may_act.sub must equal ai_agent_client_id (not banking_app_client_id).
If may_act is missing or wrong, run Utility B then re-run step 1.

item.name: 5a. Exchange #1: AI Agent Actor Token (Client Credentials)

exec: throw new Error('ai_agent_client_id not set — fill in BX Finance AI Agent App client ID');
console.log('[Step 5a] AI Agent Actor Token response:', JSON.stringify(body, null, 2));
if (body.error === 'invalid_scope') console.error('[Step 5a] FIX: No openid — CC does not support OIDC scopes');
if (body.error === 'unauthorized_client') console.error('[Step 5a] FIX: Client Credentials grant not enabled on AI Agent App');
console.log('[Step 5a] Agent Actor Token claims:', JSON.stringify(claims, null, 2));
pm.test('Agent Actor Token aud is Agent Gateway', () => {
console.log('[Step 5a] Agent Actor Token ready — proceed to step 5b');
console.warn('[Step 5a] Could not decode token:', e.message);

request.description:
AI Agent App gets its own Actor Token via Client Credentials.
audience = https://agent-gateway.pingdemo.com (BX Finance Agent Gateway resource server).
Do NOT include openid or any OIDC scope.

This token will be passed as actor_token in step 5b to prove the AI Agent's identity.

item.name: 5b. Exchange #1: Subject Token → Agent Exchanged Token (RFC 8693)

exec: throw new Error('subject_token is empty — run steps 1-4 first');
throw new Error('agent_actor_token is empty — run step 5a first');
console.error('[Step 5b] FIX: may_act.sub on user does not match ai_agent_client_id');
console.error('[Step 5b] Run Utility B — set mayAct.sub = ai_agent_client_id, then re-run steps 1-4');
if (body.error === 'unauthorized_client') console.error('[Step 5b] FIX: Token Exchange grant not enabled on AI Agent App');
console.log('[Step 5b] Agent Exchanged Token claims (Token 2):', JSON.stringify(claims, null, 2));
pm.test('Agent Exchanged Token aud is MCP Server', () => {
console.log('[Step 5b] Token 2 (Agent Exchanged Token) ready — proceed to step 6a');
console.warn('[Step 5b] Could not decode token:', e.message);

urlencoded.description: Token 1 — user Subject Token from step 4
AI Agent Actor Token from step 5a
BX Finance AI Agent App — exchanger

request.description:
Exchange #1 (RFC 8693): Subject Token + Agent Actor Token → Agent Exchanged Token (Token 2).

PingOne validates: subject_token.may_act.sub == actor_token.aud[0] == ai_agent_client_id.
If valid, issues Agent Exchanged Token with:
  aud = ["https://mcp-server.pingdemo.com"]
  sub = <user-id> (preserved)
  act = { "sub": "<AI_AGENT_CLIENT_ID>" }

Requires Token Exchange grant on BX Finance AI Agent App.

exec: throw new Error('agent_exchanged_token is empty — run steps 5a and 5b first');
throw new Error('mcp_client_id not set — fill in BX Finance MCP Service client ID');
console.log('[Step 6a] MCP Actor Token response:', JSON.stringify(body, null, 2));
if (body.error === 'invalid_scope') console.error('[Step 6a] FIX: No openid — CC does not support OIDC scopes');
if (body.error === 'unauthorized_client') console.error('[Step 6a] FIX: Client Credentials grant not enabled on MCP Service App');
console.log('[Step 6a] MCP Actor Token claims:', JSON.stringify(claims, null, 2));
pm.test('MCP Actor Token aud is MCP Gateway', () => {
console.log('[Step 6a] MCP Actor Token ready — proceed to step 6b');
console.warn('[Step 6a] Could not decode token:', e.message);

request.description:
MCP Service App gets its own Actor Token via Client Credentials.
audience = https://mcp-gateway.pingdemo.com (BX Finance MCP Gateway resource server).
Do NOT include openid or any OIDC scope.

This token will be passed as actor_token in step 6b to prove the MCP Service's identity.

item.name: 6b. Exchange #2: Agent Exchanged Token → MCP Exchanged Token (RFC 8693)

exec: throw new Error('agent_exchanged_token is empty — run steps 5a and 5b first');
throw new Error('mcp_actor_token is empty — run step 6a first');
console.error('[Step 6b] FIX: Agent Exchanged Token has no act claim — check act expression on BX Finance MCP Server resource server (doc Part 1c)');
if (body.error === 'unauthorized_client') console.error('[Step 6b] FIX: Token Exchange grant not enabled on MCP Service App');
console.log('[Step 6b] MCP Exchanged Token claims (Token 3 — FINAL):', JSON.stringify(claims, null, 2));
pm.test('MCP Exchanged Token aud is Resource Server', () => {
if (claims.act.act) console.log('[Step 6b] act.act (inner — AI Agent):', claims.act.act.sub);
console.log('[Step 6b] ✓ Full delegation chain verified — Token 3 ready for PAZ enforcement');
console.log('[Step 6b] Now optionally run step 8 (User Lookup) or Utility A (Introspect)');
console.warn('[Step 6b] Could not decode token:', e.message);

urlencoded.description: Token 2 — Agent Exchanged Token from step 5b
BX Finance Resource Server audience (final token)

item.name: 7. Client Credentials — MCP Service → PingOne API Token

exec: throw new Error('mcp_client_id not set — fill in BX Finance MCP Service client ID');
console.log('[Step 7] Client Credentials response:', JSON.stringify(body, null, 2));
if (body.error === 'invalid_scope') console.error('[Step 7] FIX: p1:read:user / p1:update:user not enabled on MCP Service app Resources tab');
if (body.error === 'unauthorized_client') console.error('[Step 7] FIX: App type may be Worker — must be Native or Web App');
console.log('[Step 7] PingOne API Token claims:', JSON.stringify(claims, null, 2));
pm.test('PingOne API Token aud is api.pingone.com', () => pm.expect(aud.join(',')).to.include('api.pingone.com'));
console.warn('[Step 7] Could not decode token:', e.message);

request.description:
Independent Client Credentials grant for PingOne Management API access.
This is NOT part of the delegation chain — it is a separate machine-to-machine token.
Scopes p1:read:user and p1:update:user must be enabled on the app's Resources tab.
App type must be Native or Web App — NOT Worker.
Do NOT include openid.

exec: throw new Error('pingone_api_token is empty — run step 7 first');
throw new Error('user_sub is empty — run steps 1-4 first to decode the Subject Token');
console.warn('[Step 8] WARNING: mayAct attribute not set on user — run Utility B to set it');
console.warn('[Step 8] mayAct.sub must be ai_agent_client_id (NOT banking_app_client_id)');

request.description:
Calls PingOne Management API to fetch the user record.
Uses PingOne API Token from step 7 — Bearer auth.
Validates that mayAct.sub equals ai_agent_client_id (NOT banking_app_client_id).
If wrong, run Utility B to update it.

exec: console.log('[Utility A] Introspection result:', JSON.stringify(body, null, 2));
if (!body.active) console.warn('[Utility A] Token is NOT active (expired or revoked)');
console.log('[Utility A] Token active — sub:', body.sub, '| aud:', body.aud, '| scope:', body.scope);
if (body.act) console.log('[Utility A] act chain:', JSON.stringify(body.act, null, 2));

urlencoded.description: Change to subject_token, agent_exchanged_token, or mcp_exchanged_token

request.description:
Introspects a saved token (RFC 7662).

Default: mcp_exchanged_token (Token 3 — shows nested act chain).
Change the token body param to inspect any of:
  subject_token       — Token 1, shows may_act
  agent_exchanged_token — Token 2, shows act.sub = AI Agent
  mcp_exchanged_token — Token 3, shows act.sub=MCP, act.act.sub=AI Agent

item.name: Utility B — Set mayAct on User (AI Agent Client ID)

exec: throw new Error('pingone_api_token is empty — run step 7 first');
throw new Error('user_sub is empty — run steps 1-4 first');
throw new Error('ai_agent_client_id not set — this is the value that goes in mayAct.sub');
console.log('[Utility B] PATCH response:', JSON.stringify(body, null, 2));
console.log('[Utility B] mayAct set to:', JSON.stringify(body.mayAct));
console.log('[Utility B] Now re-run steps 1-4 to get a fresh Subject Token with may_act claim.');
console.log('[Utility B] Clear auth.pingone.com cookies in Postman first to avoid a stale session.');

request.description:
PATCHes mayAct = { sub: ai_agent_client_id } onto the user record.

IMPORTANT: In the 2-exchange pattern, mayAct.sub must be the AI Agent App client ID
— NOT the Banking App client ID used in the 1-exchange pattern.

Run this if step 4 warns that may_act is missing or has the wrong sub.
After patching, clear auth.pingone.com cookies in Postman, then re-run steps 1–4.

Requires pingone_api_token (step 7) and user_sub (steps 1-4).

Token 1 — Subject Token. aud=ai-agent.pingdemo.com, may_act.sub=AI_AGENT_CLIENT_ID. Set by step 4.
User subject UUID — decoded from Subject Token, set by step 4
AI Agent Actor Token — aud=agent-gateway.pingdemo.com. Set by step 5a.
Token 2 — Agent Exchanged Token. aud=mcp-server.pingdemo.com, act.sub=AI_AGENT_CLIENT_ID. Set by step 5b.
MCP Actor Token — aud=mcp-gateway.pingdemo.com. Set by step 6a.
Token 3 — MCP Exchanged Token (final). aud=resource-server.pingdemo.com, act.sub=MCP, act.act.sub=AI_AGENT. Set by step 6b.
PingOne Management API Token — set by step 7 (client credentials, independent of delegation chain)
MCP Server resource URI — used as resource= param in Exchange #2 (RFC 8693)
